text.message: fwiw i fully expect to be plowed in some way here
green where you want second settle?
and try for the brick port
might have to do 2 9 6, tho so i dont get plowed to port
i won't plow port if left to me
ok i can leave it for you blue
im willing to cede brick port for a wheat trade at my convenience green?
I can get you a wheat if you dont plow black
okay ill take a future wheat from each of you haha
just tryin to have some fun out here
will def trade for some sheep
well there goes our friendly game
okay why am i the rob
yeah i was hesitant on that one, figured he used all his wood
black is def trading wood now w/o port
i trade for anything other than sheep
will you give me something not to plow?
dang too good to pass up
looking like blue and green run away with this game
one of these jokers ruined my game, the other kicked me while i was down
so now we go full toxic
which is ironic, coz blue always had the strongest position here imo
kinda want to join you black haha
what happened with the rob black, i missed that
lets do it, quicker this game is over, quicker i can play another
i have a bad steal on the 8 wood
the robber should have never been on the 8 wood lol
with blues game the way it is setup
i mean you never shoulda plowed green
we had such a civil game going
it was gonna take a 3v1 to stop blue
i think u are the favorite over blue with wood port
typical, people always over value ports over wheat/ore production
and the ore is weak af
black..  i could have you take 10 3 11..
sorry blue you still way ahead
if i cant use the wood port, you cant either haha
also i still owed blue 2 nbs
but you dont have to go full tr0ll
he did say he was going to
be honest, wouldnt you do the same?
huge underrated part of this game
and i robbed his brick lol
you can have next wood tho
where you get that much wheat black.
i forgot i owed you that for a second
this is the most honest game of catan ive played in a while lmao
blue rolling that number on their turn
not making it past this turn
if you take the numbers out of my name, it spells "KOS" aka chaos
hard to fade that kind of luck
red could have dropped another road tho
red do u have a road?
i mean wrap and then build 1
